Mythic+ logs and characters not in your: Mythic+ logs and characters not in your roster will be filtered out and will not be processed.

After your scheduled raid ends, the syst: After your scheduled raid ends, the system waits the configured number of minutes for logs to be uploaded.
It then automatically searches your guil: It then automatically searches your guild on Warcraft Logs for matching reports.
Found logs are linked to the raid event: Found logs are linked to the raid event and sent for AI analysis.
Once analysis is complete, a notificatio: Once analysis is complete, a notification is sent to your Discord notifications channel with a link to the report.
If no logs are found, a notification is: If no logs are found, a notification is sent with a link to upload logs manually.
Make sure your Discord notifications web: Make sure your Discord notifications webhook is configured in the Discord tab for notifications to work.
Complete the following steps to activate: Complete the following steps to activate automatic AI analysis:

BlastR is a tool for coordinating your W: BlastR is a tool for coordinating your WoW raid team. You can create your own team or join an existing one using an invite link from your Raid Leader.
Choose \"Create New Team\" if you are th: Choose "Create New Team" if you are the Raid Leader or want to start a new group.
Choose \"Join Existing Team\" if someone: Choose "Join Existing Team" if someone sent you an invite link.
Enter your raid group name and select a: Enter your raid group name and select a region (EU or US). After creating the team, you can invite other players.
The team name can be your guild name or: The team name can be your guild name or any other name you prefer.
Select the region matching your WoW acco: Select the region matching your WoW account (EU or US).
Paste the invite link your Raid Leader s: Paste the invite link your Raid Leader sent you. It looks like: blastr.gg/join/TOKEN. You can paste the full link or just the token part.
Paste the full invite link — we'll extra: Paste the full invite link — we'll extract the token automatically.
After pasting, you'll see the team name: After pasting, you'll see the team name and details before joining.
Your characters are synced from Battle.n: Your characters are synced from Battle.net. Choose your main character (required) and optionally select alts for raiding.
Your main character is the one you prima: Your main character is the one you primarily raid with.
Alts are optional — you can add or chang: Alts are optional — you can add or change them later.
If characters are missing, click \"Re-sy: If characters are missing, click "Re-sync from Battle.net".
